title: oxalis angulata
intro: Oxalis angulata, also known as the angle-leaved wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the oxalis genus and is native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of oxalis angulata include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
